title: thelypteris tibangensis
intro: Thelypteris tibangensis is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as a type of sensitive fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris tibangensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it in a decoction to treat various health conditions.
